name: Portuguese Eggs with Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb garlic-seasoned pork sausage, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 10-inch skillet, melt the butter over moderate heat. When the foam has almost subsided, add the onions and stir frequently until golden.
2. Add the chicken stock, peas, parsley, coriander, sugar, salt, pepper, and sausage slices around the edge of the pan in a circle.
3. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer for five minutes.
4. Break the eggs into the skillet, keeping them well apart. Sprinkle lightly with salt and pepper.
5. Cover and cook for three or four minutes until the egg whites are set. Serve immediately.
